ground_truth.title: Test letter from Bush re: Iraq

paragraphs.text: Executive Order No. 12723 and not revoked administratively shall remain in full force and effect under this order until amended.
This order shall be transmitted to the Congress and published in the Federal Register.
Today, I have taken additional steps to respond to these developments and to ensure that the economic measures we are taking with respect to Iraq and Kuwait conform to UNSCR 661.
The order I have issued with respect to Iraq prohibits exports and imports of goods and services between the United States and Iraq.
